title: AgentDebugX: An Open-Source Toolkit for Failure Observability, Attribution, and Recovery in LLM Agents
innovation_summary: AgentDebugX: An Open-Source Toolkit for Failure Observability, Attribution, and Recovery in LLM Agents: We present AgentDebugX, an open-source debugging framework that organizes debugging as a closed loop of Detect, Attribute, Recover, and Rerun.
